summary: The installer progress renderer now places the aggregate progress bar below the step list, adds local ASCII-safe indicators for every step, and keeps progress-adjacent TUI glyphs ASCII-safe for Windows terminals. Fresh targeted renderer/runtime tests, bootstrap build, lint, and task validation passed.

checks.name: bottom-aggregate-progress
checks.detail: renderProgressScreen() appends the aggregate progress bar after all step rows and before keyboard hints.

checks.name: per-step-local-indicators
checks.detail: Every step row includes a local progress indicator derived from status, with optional explicit completed/total support.

checks.name: ascii-safe-output
checks.detail: Progress indicators, pass markers, active pointers, and keyboard hints use ASCII-safe characters.

checks.name: terminal-state-accounting
checks.detail: Aggregate progress still counts only passed, warn, failed, and skipped states as complete.

checks.name: fresh-verification
checks.detail: Targeted progress tests, runtime progress tests, build, lint, and task validation all exited 0.

checks.name: separate-verifier-pass
checks.detail: A separate verifier role reviewed the diff and proof bundle without editing production code and reported pass.

residualRisks: Local step indicators are status-based by default, not duration-based. They avoid false estimates but cannot show fine-grained progress for long commands until those commands provide explicit subprogress.
